items.definition_en: A plate is a flat dish for food.
items.example_en: She put a sandwich on a plate.

items.definition_en: A cup is a small container for drinking.
items.example_en: He drank coffee from a cup.

items.definition_en: A spoon is a tool for eating or stirring.
items.example_en: She stirred her tea with a spoon.

items.definition_en: A fork is a tool with points for picking up food.
items.example_en: He used a fork to eat his salad.

items.definition_en: A knife is a tool for cutting food.
items.example_en: She cut the bread with a knife.

items.definition_en: A glass is a container for drinking.
items.example_en: He poured water into a glass.

items.definition_en: A bowl is a round dish for food or liquid.
items.example_en: She ate soup from a bowl.

items.definition_en: A sponge is a tool for cleaning.
items.example_en: She cleaned the dishes with a sponge.

items.definition_en: A coffee machine is a machine that makes coffee.
items.example_en: She made coffee with the coffee machine.

items.definition_en: A fridge is a machine that keeps food cold.
items.example_en: He put the milk in the fridge.

items.definition_en: An oven is a machine for baking or roasting food.
items.example_en: She baked a cake in the oven.

items.definition_en: A stove is a machine for cooking food.
items.example_en: He cooked rice on the stove.

items.definition_en: A sink is a bowl with a faucet for washing.
items.example_en: She washed the dishes in the sink.

items.definition_en: A pot is a container for cooking food.
items.example_en: He cooked pasta in a pot.

items.definition_en: A microwave is a machine that heats food quickly.
items.example_en: She warmed her lunch in the microwave.

items.definition_en: A pan is a flat dish for frying food.
items.example_en: He cooked eggs in a pan.

items.definition_en: A kettle is a container for boiling water.
items.example_en: She made tea with the kettle.

items.definition_en: A dishwasher is a machine that washes dishes.
items.example_en: They put dirty plates in the dishwasher.

items.definition_en: A teapot is a container for making tea.
items.example_en: She poured hot tea from the teapot.

items.definition_en: A freezer is a machine that keeps food very cold.
items.example_en: The ice cream is in the freezer.
